en.name: Kalashnikov AK-105 5.45x39 Kochevnik Bullpup Rifle
en.description: A variant of the AK-105 assault rifle modified into a bullpup configuration by the Russian arms manufacturer Kalashnikov Concern. The Kochevnik ("Nomad") features a more compact design while retaining the firepower and reliability of the original AK-105, making it suitable for close-quarters combat and urban warfare.

en.name: AK-74M Modified dust cover
en.description: A standard-issue 6P34 0-1 dust cover for AK-74M automatic rifles, manufactured by Izhmash. This particular dust cover has been modified to accommodate the unique design of the Kochevnik bullpup conversion kit.

en.name: Zenitco Kochevnik Pistol Grip
en.description: A pistol grip designed and manufactured by Zenitco for use with the Kalashnikov AK-105 Kochevnik bullpup rifle conversion kit. This ergonomic grip enhances weapon handling and control, making it easier to maneuver the compact bullpup design during close-quarters engagements.

en.name: Zenitco Kochevnik Upper Handguard
en.description: An upper handguard designed and manufactured by Zenitco for use with the Kalashnikov AK-105 Kochevnik bullpup rifle conversion kit. This handguard provides a comfortable grip surface and features mounting points for accessories, enhancing the versatility.

en.name: AK-105 raised rear sight
en.description: A standard 6P44 Sb.1-30 rear sight for AK-105 automatic rifles, manufactured by Izhmash.

en.name: Kalashnikov AK-105 5.45x39 Kochevnik Bullpup Rifle FDE
en.description: A variant of the AK-105 assault rifle modified into a bullpup configuration by the Russian arms manufacturer Kalashnikov Concern. The Kochevnik ("Nomad") features a more compact design while retaining the firepower and reliability of the original AK-105, making it suitable for close-quarters combat and urban warfare. This particular model comes in a flat dark earth (FDE) finish.

en.name: AK-74M Modified dust cover FDE
en.description: A standard-issue 6P34 0-1 dust cover for AK-74M automatic rifles, manufactured by Izhmash. This particular dust cover has been modified to accommodate the unique design of the Kochevnik bullpup conversion kit. flat dark earth (FDE) finish.

This particular model comes in a flat dark earth (FDE) finish.
